hero.title: Farika Atkins
hero.subtext: English education leader, curriculum strategist, and speaker helping schools build rigorous, inclusive, human-centered learning across secondary programmes.

about.title: Curriculum leadership grounded in strong English teaching
about.text1: I am an experienced English Language and Literature educator and department leader focused on the intersection of rigorous instruction, inclusive practice, and long-term student growth.
about.text2: My work spans grades 7 through 13 and supports schools working across IMYC, Cambridge Lower Secondary, IGCSE, and IBDP frameworks. I partner with teachers and school leaders to strengthen curriculum coherence, assessment quality, and classroom culture.
